visual_observations.composition_style: illustrated promotional graphic — two oversized cups anchoring scene with illustrated human characters and coffee cherry foliage
visual_observations.lighting: digital illustration, warm cream background with green gradient
props_visible: Coffee cherry branch with red cherries and green leaves
Small red pennant flag with '1 Oct' text
International Coffee Day bilingual branding (Arabic + English)

characters_visible.wardrobe_notes: Illustrated characters: woman in casual clothes (dark hair, no hijab visible), man in casual grey outfit holding flag
characters_visible.gesture_notes: Woman seated near cup, man standing; no physical interaction between characters

text_overlays.content_summary: بمناسبة اليوم العالمي للقهوة — On the occasion of World Coffee Day
اشتري أي مشروب واحصل على الثاني بـ 1 ريال — Buy any drink and get the second for 1 Riyal
اليوم العالمي للقهوة / International Coffee Day

notable_visual_elements: Illustrated characters are clearly cartoons, not photographs
Female character has no hijab in illustration — common in Saudi illustrated brand content (softer compliance threshold for illustrations vs photography)
Characters do not interact physically — positioned separately near cups
Bilingual branding signals international occasion adoption

soft_flags.description: Female illustrated character without hijab. In illustrated/cartoon contexts (not photography) this is generally accepted in Saudi commercial content. Noting for awareness.

cultural_notes.free_notes: Standard global occasion (World Coffee Day) leveraged with a simple discount offer. The illustrated style allows Barns to include diverse character types. The soft flag on female character presentation in illustration is a known grey zone in Saudi commercial content — major brands (including Barns) use unhijabbed illustrated women regularly in campaigns.

pattern_matches.notes: World Coffee Day (global) adopted and localized; 1-Riyal offer makes it accessible to Saudi mass market
Full illustrated graphic with discount offer for specific occasion date
1-Riyal second drink creates urgency (one day offer) without aggressive countdown language
